title: Honkai Star Rail: Weapons
description: Adds weapons from the game Honkai Star Rail to Minecraft
body:
If you like Honkai Star Rail and Minecraft this is a mod that adds weapons from the game Honkai Star Rail into Minecraft.

Features: 
- Stellar Jade Block: A block of the stellar jade ore
- Stellar Jade Ore: An ore used to craft weapons from the Honkai Star Rail universe (Spawns at y levels = -55 to -60)
- Herta's Hammer: The weapons used by the Herta puppet in the game Honkai Star Rail
- Stellar Jade: An ore used to craft weapons from the Honkai Star Rail universe
- The Head of Herta's Hammer: A piece of Herta's Hammer, used to craft the weapon
- The Shaft of Herta's Hammer: A piece of Herta's Hammer, used to craft the weapon

Credits:
Stellar Jade texture by Npmeless
